creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to fsbruva from comment #26)

Not sure what specifically is being disagreed with here, I only stated that i couldn't identify a specific change that 'obviously' caused this issue, not that there definitely weren't any.

That aside, it sounds like the issue might possibly be (or related to or involve):

  https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea/issues/19187

Either way, current status:

- 1.16.4 needs a xuml entry
- 1.16.5 (via 262898) needs a vuxml entry, commit and merge (if QA passes). Any committer  may take that issue. For comments/updates relating to the 1.16.5 update, please do so on bug 262898
